allowedMismatches.detail: expected outputs=(uint256) stateMutability=pure, actual outputs=(uint256) stateMutability=view
allowedMismatches.reason: Vendored 6.7.1 IPMarketFactory declares VERSION() pure; deployed PendleMarketFactoryV7Upg implements it view. Read-only relaxation, and Moss never calls VERSION() (the verifier uses isValidMarket/factory/readTokens/expiry/token support/decimals).

selectorProxies.note: Router and RouterStatic are selector-proxies (Diamond-style) with a zero ERC-1967 slot; explorer getabi returns only the dispatcher, so compareDeployedAbi of the vendored full interface fails wholesale. They have no explorer cross-check and stay on the pinned @pendle/core-v2 vendored derivation (ADR 0007 vendored tier). Facet-enumeration cross-check support is tracked in the linked issue.
